comment: Data, not code. Maps the PUBLIC stock falcon APK + our binary patch so a client can reconstruct our patched+signed build byte-for-byte. Immortal's provisioner (provision.sh --alexa) and the future on-device installer read this. One falcon build serves all Portal families (the amazon_alexa APK is identical across tadiphone dumps).

stock.note: Public Portal firmware dump (tadiphone). We never host Amazon's binary; the user fetches stock from here.

result.coexistence_note: Drops the <permission> declarations falcon shares with the pinned com.amazon.dee.app so both install. Conflict set is per-dee.app-version; this build targets the pinned consumer build. Standalone (free) falcon is unaffected — same-UID calls don't need them.

millennium.note: Free wake-word build. Not yet published — pending release signing.
